hero.desc: Engineering reliable solar and electrical systems for infrastructure, industries, and communities across KSA, Bahrain to Middle East and Africa.
about.title: About
about.p1: Nextera Electricals Co. W.L.L, established in 2010 and headquartered in Manama, Bahrain, is a leading manufacturer and solution provider of solar and electrical systems.
about.p2: We specialize in solar lighting, photovoltaic modules, solar home systems, and on-grid and off-grid power solutions. Our products are designed to meet international quality standards and are trusted across infrastructure, industrial, and commercial applications.
about.v1.title: Integrity
about.v1.desc: Transparent and ethical business practices in every engagement.
about.v2.title: Quality
about.v2.desc: International standards and strict quality control across all products.
about.v3.title: Innovation
about.v3.desc: Continuous development of cutting-edge energy technologies.
about.v4.title: Accountability
about.v4.desc: Reliable delivery and long-term partnerships with every client.
solutions.title: Our
solutions.subtitle: Comprehensive solar and electrical solutions tailored to every sector, from urban infrastructure to residential energy needs.
solutions.s1.title: Urban & Infrastructure Lighting
solutions.s1.desc: Reliable solar lighting systems designed for roads, highways, smart cities, and public infrastructure.
solutions.s2.title: Public & Community Spaces
solutions.s2.desc: Efficient and aesthetic solar lighting solutions for parks, walkways, gardens, and residential communities.
solutions.s3.title: Residential & Rural Solutions
solutions.s3.desc: Practical solar energy systems designed for homes and off-grid locations.
solutions.s4.title: Industrial & Commercial Power Systems
solutions.s4.desc: High-capacity solar systems engineered for commercial and industrial energy needs.
products.title: Our
products.subtitle: Every product is designed, tested, and manufactured to meet international quality standards for maximum performance and longevity.
custom.title: Customized
custom.p: Standard configurations are available for most applications. Customized system designs can be developed based on backup requirements, site conditions, and project specifications, supported by in-house engineering and feasibility assessment.
custom.f1.title: Site Assessment
custom.f1.p: Detailed site evaluation and feasibility studies
custom.f2.title: System Design
custom.f2.p: Custom engineering based on your energy needs
custom.f3.title: Installation & Support
cta.title: Ready to discuss your project?
cta.p: Our technical team is ready to analyze your requirements and propose the optimal energy solution.
quote.title: Request a Quote
quote.p: Tell us about your project requirements and our team will respond within 24 hours.
quote.successP: We've received your request. Our engineering team will contact you within 24 hours with a tailored solution proposal.
